ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the building is located */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of the building (e.g., office, mall, airport) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the building in square meters */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the building */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the building's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the building's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "floors" (
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each floor */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the floor is located */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the floor (e.g., JSON representation of the floor plan) */,
  "floor_area" REAL /* Area of the floor in square meters */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the floor in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("floor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_floors_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the floor where the room is located */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the room (e.g., JSON representation of the room plan) */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of the room (e.g., office, meeting room, hallway) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the room (e.g., projector, whiteboard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_floor_id FOREIGN KEY ("floor_id") REFERENCES floors ("floor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Wi-Fi access point, Bluetooth beacon) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device (e.g., room, floor, building) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device or object being located */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room where the device or object is located */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the device or object */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the device or object */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the device or object */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user (e.g., employee, visitor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being tracked */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device being used for tracking */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the track */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the track */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken during the track (e.g., JSON representation of the route) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_points" (
  "access_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device being used as an access point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the access point (e.g., room, floor, building) */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the access point in dBm */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the access point in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_points_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beacons" (
  "beacon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beacon */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device being used as a beacon */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the beacon (e.g., room, floor, building) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the beacon in percentage */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the beacon in dBm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beacon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beacons_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track being analyzed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the analytics record */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the analytics record */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the track */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Time spent during the track */,
  "user_behavior" TEXT /* User behavior patterns (e.g., frequently visited areas) */,
  "operational_insights" TEXT /* Operational insights (e.g., high-traffic areas, peak times) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
